name: pyralis
description: Ecommerce and Canadian finance tools for AI agents. Optimize product listings, scan competitor pricing, get TSX quotes, and calculate Canadian taxes.

tools.name: optimize_listing
tools.description: Optimize an ecommerce product listing for SEO. Returns optimized title, description, tags, and pricing suggestions. Supports Shopify, Etsy, Amazon.

tools.name: scan_competitor
tools.description: Scan competitor pricing for a product across Amazon, Etsy, Google Shopping, and Walmart. Returns live prices, ratings, and listing URLs.

tools.name: tsx_quote
tools.description: Get real-time TSX stock quotes with RSI, volume, and day change. Covers 22+ TSX-listed stocks. Canadian market data.

tools.name: canadian_tax_calc
tools.description: Calculate Canadian capital gains tax, marginal tax rates, and TFSA/RRSP/FHSA contribution limits. 2026 federal and provincial brackets.

auth.note: Free during beta. No key required. Per-call pricing coming soon.
